changelog: Sports schedule fix (the REAL one for the missing MTL vs BUF game): backend was filtering out any game where TheSportsDB hadn't published a broadcaster yet, AND was storing midnight UTC for games with empty strTime (making them look like past games). Both fixed: backend now stores empty-time games at 23:00 UTC (~7pm EDT, the typical NA prime-time slot), widens past-lookback to 30h, and no longer drops games with null channel.
Android: the games rail now also shows games with no resolved broadcaster — the per-game picker handles channel resolution on tap.
All v1.44.58 features still in place (game rail no longer requires strict primary-match, CBC picker blacklist, themes pack v5, Sports back-nav fix).
